groups.title: Writing & Humanities Core
groups.notes: Complete the writing sequence before upper-division lab courses.

groups.title: Math & Chemistry Core
groups.notes: Organic chemistry must be completed before molecular biology.

groups.title: Social Science & Ethics
groups.notes: Select one course that fulfills the civic engagement requirement.

groups.title: Biology Foundations
groups.notes: Intro sequence includes lectures and core lab skills.

groups.title: Advanced Biology Core
groups.notes: BIOL 410 capstone requires completion of genetics and cell biology.

groups.title: Biology Electives
groups.notes: Choose electives from ecology, microbiology, or neuroscience tracks.
